SQLLite.SQL: SELECT DISTINCT H.CASE_NUMBER AS "CaseNumber" , C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "AdminCourtCode" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR , PARTIES P , HEARINGS H , CASES C WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = H.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE IN ('DEFENDANT' , 'PT 20 DEF') AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND H.HRG_DATE = TO_DATE(${param.hearingDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND (H.HRG_OUTCOME != 'V' OR H.HRG_OUTCOME IS NULL ) AND H.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND H.CASE_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode}

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
